title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 79.350 - Mayor or board may inspect books and records of officers
text:
79.350.  Mayor or board may inspect books and records of officers. — The mayor or board of aldermen shall have power, as often as he or they may deem it necessary, to require any officer of the city to exhibit his accounts or other papers or records, and to make report to the board of aldermen, in writing, touching any matter relating to his office.
(RSMo 1939 § 7106) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6956; 1919 § 8407; 1909 § 9309
